_comment: GEA-10 (D446): the STABLE CONCEPT-ID registry (docs/design/genre-elite-p1-contracts.md GEA-10). Each concept id (concept:<kebab>) maps to EXACTLY ONE canonical surface anchor: kind 'codex' -> a data/codex.json entry id; kind 'glossary' -> a codex entry's exact term string (the glossary source IS the codex); kind 'source' -> a data/primary-sources.json record id; kind 'card' -> a battle teaching-card id (searched across all registered battles' teaching.cards, battle- and phase-level). Surfaces opt in by annotating EXISTING copy spans with data-concept="<id>" (plus data-no-gloss so the inline glossary never nests a term button inside a concept span); src/110-concept-links.js decorates only RESOLVABLE spans (unknown ids stay plain text, no dead link — the fail-closed contract) and opens the canonical content in a focus-trapped modal that RETURNS FOCUS to the invoking span on close (the S12/S22 focus law). Provenance travels: every kind's canonical render includes its sources/provenance visibly. WIRING ONLY — no prose was changed, no new content authored. Validated by tools/validate-data-schemas.mjs (validateConceptLinks; the concept-badanchor permanent fixture): closed shapes and LIVE-DERIVED anchor resolution against the owning data files (registry-truth, never a hardcoded list).
